channel.title: Machine Learning on Ika Qutami's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Machine Learning on Ika Qutami's Blog

item.title: NLP with Machine Learning
item.description: Learn the fundamentals of Natural Language Processing (NLP) with machine learning, including text preprocessing techniques such as tokenization, stemming, lemmatization, stopword removal, Part-of-Speech (POS) tagging, and Named Entity Recognition (NER).
